title: viola calcarata var. zoysii
intro: Viola calcarata var. zoysii, also known as Zois' pansy or Viola zoysii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. This plant is a type of perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola calcarata var. zoysii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
